HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON ONELABS TENANTS' TRO APPLICATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Matthew Gluck; Gluck Daniel Atkinson LLP; 415-510-2114; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Felix Wai, Two to Four LLC, MFR Apartments LLC, and Green Hills Views, LLC, and cross-defendnats John Wai, Felix Wai, Rubber Ducking LC and Structure Properties Inc.
Yoseph Peretz; Peretz & Associates; 415-732-3777; appearing as counsel for defendants and cross-complainants Fathi Said, Vybe Living LLC, At Home SF LLC, Golden Gate Living LLC, and cross-complainants Yaroslav Mudryi and One49Labs LLC.

The parties seek clarification as the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON ONELABS TENANTS' TRO APPLICATION is DENIED in part; GRANTED in part; and continued in part.
The request to enjoin the landlord from collecting lease payments directly from the Mudryi Group's subtenants is continued to November 3, 2023 to be heard with the Landlord's pending motion. The TRO on this issue remains in effect until further ruling of this Court.
The request to enjoin the landlord from signing new lease agreement or placing new tenants in Mudryi's Group vacant units is denied as it does not appear to be an outstanding issue in the supplemental briefing filed in response to Court's October 10, 2023 order.
The request to enjoin the landlord from changing the locks and entry codes without 24-hour advanced notice is GRANTED. Any changes to the locks/codes must be on a 24-hour notice.
Request to provide current keys and access codes is DENIED. The issue is moot per the supplemental briefing submitted by the moving party.
Request to return all internet equipment and cancel internet service accounts is DENIED. The issue is moot per the supplemental briefing submitted by the moving party.
The issues regarding master code, return of locks and maintenance requests are not properly before the Court at this time per the Notice of TRO and OSC issued thereon.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
